subject: Last Call: Secure Implementation for Fall 2026
previewText: Time is running out to get BehaviorSchool Pro implemented for the new school year.
body:
Hi [Name],

The new school year is just around the corner. If you want to start the year off right with a better system for behavior support, now is the time to act.

Implementing a new system takes time. We want to ensure that you and your team are fully trained and ready to go on day one. That's why we're encouraging all districts who want to implement BehaviorSchool Pro for the fall to sign up by [Date].

By signing up now, you'll get:

*   **A dedicated implementation specialist** to guide you through the process.
*   **Comprehensive training** for your entire team.
*   **Early access** to our new features and updates.

Don't wait until it's too late. Secure your spot now and make this the year that you finally get a handle on behavior support in your district.

[Link to Get Started]

Sincerely,

Rob Spain, BCBA
